svg.title: ML Pipeline System Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end ML pipeline from raw data to model deployment, showing data acquisition, preprocessing, supervised and unsupervised models, evaluation, and visualization layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the data acquisition layer using KDDCup99 dataset')
sendPrompt('Explain the preprocessing pipeline steps including SMOTE and PCA')
sendPrompt('What supervised models are used and how are they hyperparameter tuned?')
sendPrompt('How does Isolation Forest work as an unsupervised model for anomaly detection?')
sendPrompt('What evaluation metrics and statistical tests are used in the evaluation layer?')
sendPrompt('What visualizations are produced from the ML pipeline results?')
g.text: Bar charts · ROC curves · Confusion matrices
Feature importance · PCA variance · Correlation heatmap
